      (on-table b3)

      (on-table b5)

      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b13 on table, b12 on b13, b11 on b12, b10 on b11
      (on-table b13)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 3): b2, b3, b4 (b2 on table, b3 on b2, b4 on b3)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 4): b5, b6, b7, b8 (b5 on table, b6 on b5, b7 on b6, b8 on b7)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 8): b9, b10, b11, b12, b13, b14, b15, b16 (b9 on table)
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (clear b16)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)

      (on-table b4)
      (on b3 b4)
      (on b2 b3)

  (:goal
